# Export compatibility

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-compatibility.mjs. Do not edit manually. -->

This matrix covers forward conversion from Mermaid 11.16.0 through the shared Diagram IR. Reverse import is out of scope.

## Current format summary

| Format | Current level | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| pptx | smart | Flowcharts support tiered smart, faithful, and exact modes. |
| svg | editable | Normalized standalone SVG with editable vector elements. |
| drawio | editable | Editable vertices, containers, and waypoints; connectivity is preserved when endpoints resolve, otherwise diagnosed as detached. |
| json-canvas | hybrid | Editable cards/connectivity with diagnosed visual-style loss. |

Levels: **smart** uses native editable relationships with fallback; **editable** preserves target-native objects; **hybrid** keeps core semantics with diagnosed visual loss; **exact** is appearance-first; **planned** is not implemented; **unsupported** has no useful current mapping.

## Mermaid 11.16.0 diagram types

| Diagram type | PPTX | SVG | draw.io | JSON Canvas |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| flowchart | smart | editable | editable | hybrid |
| sequenceDiagram | exact | planned | planned | planned |
| classDiagram | exact | planned | planned | planned |
| stateDiagram-v2 | exact | planned | planned | planned |
| erDiagram | exact | planned | planned | planned |
| gantt | exact | planned | planned | unsupported |
| pie | exact | planned | planned | unsupported |
| journey | exact | planned | planned | unsupported |
| gitGraph | exact | planned | planned | unsupported |
| requirementDiagram | exact | planned | planned | planned |
| mindmap | exact | planned | planned | planned |
| timeline | exact | planned | planned | planned |
| quadrantChart | exact | planned | planned | unsupported |
| sankey-beta | exact | planned | planned | unsupported |
| xychart-beta | exact | planned | planned | unsupported |
| block-beta | exact | planned | planned | planned |
| packet-beta | exact | planned | planned | unsupported |
| architecture-beta | exact | planned | planned | planned |
| kanban | exact | planned | planned | planned |

Non-flowchart PPTX entries marked **exact** require `mode: "exact"` and a source-SVG workflow to preserve the renderer appearance. DiagramIR-only exact mode embeds normalized IR SVG instead. Neither route claims editable internal nodes or edges.

## Exporter feature details

| Format | Mode | Feature | Support | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| pptx | smart | node-geometry | native | Native editable PowerPoint node shapes. |
| pptx | smart | node-text | native | Native editable PowerPoint text. |
| pptx | smart | edge-connectivity | fallback | Simple paths use bound native connectors; complex paths fall back per edge. |
| pptx | smart | edge-paths | fallback | Straight, orthogonal, and simple curves are native; complex paths use faithful or SVG fallback. |
| pptx | smart | edge-styles | fallback | Basic line and marker styling is editable; unsupported details are diagnosed. |
| pptx | smart | background | native | Slide background color is preserved. |
| pptx | faithful | node-geometry | native | Native editable PowerPoint node shapes. |
| pptx | faithful | node-text | native | Native editable PowerPoint text. |
| pptx | faithful | edge-connectivity | fallback | Geometry-safe straight edges use bound native connectors; other edges remain open Freeforms and do not follow moved nodes. |
| pptx | faithful | edge-paths | native | Straight edges use one native connector; orthogonal, curved, and complex supported paths use one open Freeform to avoid changing their geometry. |
| pptx | faithful | edge-styles | fallback | Dash and markers are preserved; some detailed stroke semantics may differ. |
| pptx | faithful | background | native | Slide background color is preserved. |
| pptx | exact | visual-fidelity | fallback | Source-SVG workflows sanitize and embed the original renderer SVG; DiagramIR-only workflows embed a normalized IR SVG instead. |
| pptx | exact | internal-editability | unsupported | Internal nodes and edges are not editable PowerPoint objects. |
| pptx | exact | background | native | Slide background color is preserved. |
| svg | — | stable-ids | native | Stable IDs are derived from Mermaid/IR element IDs. |
| svg | — | node-geometry | native | Absolute bounds and supported node outlines are serialized. |
| svg | — | node-text | native | Multiline text and basic font styling are serialized. |
| svg | — | edge-connectivity | fallback | Visual geometry is preserved, but SVG has no portable node attachment model. |
| svg | — | edge-paths | native | Canonical lines, curves, quadratic segments, and arcs are serialized. |
| svg | — | edge-waypoints | native | Polyline waypoints are preserved. |
| svg | — | edge-styles | native | Color, width, dash, cap, join, opacity, and markers are inline. |
| svg | — | background | native | Diagram background color is serialized as SVG geometry. |
| svg | — | groups | native | Flowchart subgraph outlines are editable SVG group elements with deterministic parent metadata. |
| drawio | — | stable-ids | native | Stable mxCell IDs are derived from Mermaid/IR element IDs. |
| drawio | — | node-geometry | native | Vertex x, y, width, and height are preserved. |
| drawio | — | node-text | native | Node and edge label text are preserved. |
| drawio | — | edge-connectivity | fallback | Edges reference vertex cells when semantic IDs resolve or endpoint geometry identifies a unique node; unresolved endpoints remain detached and are diagnosed. |
| drawio | — | edge-paths | fallback | Canonical curves are reduced to editable waypoints. |
| drawio | — | edge-waypoints | native | Intermediate points are stored in mxGeometry. |
| drawio | — | edge-styles | fallback | Basic colors, widths, dashes, and markers are mapped. |
| drawio | — | background | unsupported | Document background color is diagnosed and omitted. |
| drawio | — | groups | native | Flowchart subgraphs become editable draw.io container cells. |
| json-canvas | — | stable-ids | native | Stable IDs are derived from Mermaid/IR element IDs. |
| json-canvas | — | node-geometry | native | Text-card x, y, width, and height are preserved. |
| json-canvas | — | node-text | native | Node text and edge label text are preserved. |
| json-canvas | — | edge-connectivity | fallback | Resolved edges reference fromNode and toNode; JSON Canvas requires unresolved edges to be diagnosed and omitted. |
| json-canvas | — | edge-sides | fallback | Named ports map to four sides; other ports use geometry inference. |
| json-canvas | — | edge-paths | unsupported | JSON Canvas has no custom path or waypoint field. |
| json-canvas | — | edge-waypoints | unsupported | Only edge connectivity and sides are preserved. |
| json-canvas | — | edge-styles | fallback | Color and arrow/none ends are mapped; rich stroke style is diagnosed. |
| json-canvas | — | background | unsupported | JSON Canvas has no document background color field. |
| json-canvas | — | groups | unsupported | JSON Canvas 1.0 has no portable group/container object; each group is diagnosed. |
